name: worldcup-prediction-2026
description: 2026 FIFA 世界杯赛事预测系统（Elo + 多特征融合 + 蒙特卡洛模拟）

scripts.refresh-elo: node scripts/fetch-data.mjs && node scripts/build-elo.mjs && node scripts/fetch-elo-official.mjs && node scripts/fetch-fifa-ranking.mjs && node scripts/build-squad-ratings.mjs
scripts.pregame: node scripts/fetch-elo-official.mjs && node scripts/fetch-fifa-ranking.mjs && node scripts/build-squad-ratings.mjs && node scripts/fetch-odds.mjs && node scripts/fetch-titan007-odds.mjs && node scripts/fetch-weather.mjs && node scripts/fetch-injuries.mjs && node scripts/fetch-results.mjs && node scripts/build-elo-v2.mjs && node scripts/build-xg-v2.mjs && node scripts/batch-predict.mjs && node scripts/build-html.mjs && node scripts/build-dual-page.mjs
scripts.v2: node scripts/fetch-results.mjs && node scripts/build-elo-v2.mjs && node scripts/build-xg-v2.mjs && node scripts/build-html.mjs && node scripts/build-dual-page.mjs
scripts.backtest: node scripts/backtest-cl.mjs && node scripts/build-backtest-page.mjs --data data/backtest-cl.json --out output/backtest.html
scripts.backtest-epl: node scripts/backtest-league.mjs && node scripts/build-backtest-page.mjs --data data/backtest-epl.json --out output/backtest-epl.html
scripts.all: node scripts/batch-predict.mjs && node scripts/simulate.mjs && node scripts/report.mjs && node scripts/build-html.mjs
